novel_features.name: Inbox health composite score
novel_features.description: Compute a 0-100 inbox health score from local SQLite, factoring in unread count, stale thread ratio, bounce rate, spam score, and quota utilization.

novel_features.name: Stale thread detection
novel_features.description: Scan synced mailboxes for threads with unanswered inbound messages older than a configurable threshold (default 48h).

novel_features.name: Oversight dashboard
novel_features.description: Display a summary of pending oversight approvals across all mailboxes, grouped by direction and mailbox.

novel_features.name: Trust ladder status
novel_features.description: Show the current trust ladder position for each mailbox with upgrade eligibility and operator approval flow status.

novel_features.name: Quota forecast
novel_features.description: Project email quota usage for the remainder of the billing period based on the current send rate.

novel_features.name: Send analytics
novel_features.description: Display send/receive analytics for the current billing period from the /v1/usage endpoint.

novel_features.name: Offline email search
novel_features.description: Full-text search across locally synced emails by subject, sender, or body content without making API calls.

novel_features.name: Incremental sync
novel_features.description: Pull new and updated emails from the API into the local SQLite cache using cursor-based pagination.
